Plain Page Title

This article has no OpenGraph tags. We rely on the standard title element and the meta description as a fallback. The body has enough text to make readability happy and to bypass the SPA fallback path entirely. Second paragraph: making sure the chunker has at least two distinct sections to play with. Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium totam rem aperiam.
